evals.prompt: Generate a case study from the Thrive Retreats client-win entry in idea-bank.json (entry_id: thrive-188pct). Produce the full 4-deliverable bundle (LinkedIn carousel, X thread, blog post, Instagram carousel) coordinated under one Setup→Problem→Diagnosis→Fix→Result→Lesson narrative. Apply Conservative client-naming policy: Thrive Retreats is on the public allowlist so the name may be used.
evals.expected_output: A `case-study-thrive-188pct/` directory in pending-approval/ containing 4 markdown drafts + manifest.json. Hook on Slide 1 of LI carousel, Tweet 1 of X thread, H1 of blog post, and Slide 1 of IG carousel all reference '188%' verbatim. validate_case_study.py exits clean. Visual briefs for LI + IG carousels written to brand/queue/briefs/.

assertions.name: four_deliverables_present
assertions.description: Bundle directory contains linkedin-carousel.md, x-thread.md, blog-post.md, instagram-carousel.md

assertions.name: manifest_links_all_four
assertions.description: manifest.json lists all 4 deliverables with their entry_id and case_study_bundle id

assertions.name: hook_consistency
assertions.description: Headline metric (188%) appears verbatim in Slide 1 of LI, Tweet 1 of X, Blog H1, Slide 1 of IG

assertions.name: naming_policy_applied
assertions.description: Client name used directly because Thrive is on credentials.md public allowlist

assertions.name: validate_case_study_passes
assertions.description: validate_case_study.py returns exit 0 (no hook drift, no metric drift, no voice violations)

evals.prompt: Generate a case study from a non-client-win idea-bank entry (e.g., a hot-take entry with type: take, not type: client-win).
evals.expected_output: Skill refuses to proceed. case_study.py prepare exits with non-zero status and a clear message: 'Entry is not a client-win. Use post-writer instead for general ideas.' No files written to pending-approval/.

assertions.name: skill_refuses_non_client_win
assertions.description: Script exits with non-zero status when source entry is not type: client-win

assertions.name: clear_error_message
assertions.description: Error message instructs user to use post-writer for non-client-win entries
